raw:
PRIORITY FEATURES - Concord

- The mobile ui needs work. Its impossible to log out, the pages dont scroll, text doesnt format properly. and more. THis menu feels cheap and terrible on mobile and that needs to change.

- I want rich text display in all chat rooms. Seeing my ai agent desperately stuff formatting into their response only for it to be ignored is pretty rough.

- When I type more than can fit on one line the text input box needs to grow to accomodate that text. That measn that the chat display moves up dynamically as well.
optimized:
### OPT-001: Fix mobile UI usability defects
Audit and repair Concord mobile UI. Required fixes: expose a reachable logout control, enable vertical scrolling on all pages, correct text formatting/wrapping, and resolve layout issues that make the menu feel broken on mobile. Acceptance: logout reachable from mobile nav, all pages scroll, text renders without overflow/clipping, menu matches desktop quality bar.

Source: "The mobile ui needs work. Its impossible to log out, the pages dont scroll, text doesnt format properly. and more. THis menu feels cheap and terrible on mobile and that needs to change."

### OPT-002: Render rich text in chat rooms
Add rich text rendering to all chat room message displays. Parse and render markdown formatting (bold, italic, code blocks, inline code, lists, links, headings, blockquotes) in incoming and outgoing messages across every room type. Acceptance: AI agent formatted responses display with intended formatting instead of raw markdown.

Source: "I want rich text display in all chat rooms. Seeing my ai agent desperately stuff formatting into their response only for it to be ignored is pretty rough."

### OPT-003: Auto-grow chat input with dynamic message list reflow
Make the chat input textarea grow vertically as the user types multi-line content. The message display area above must shrink/shift upward in sync so no messages are hidden behind the growing input. Enforce a reasonable max height with internal scrolling beyond that. Acceptance: typing past one line expands input smoothly, message list reflows in real time, no overlap between input and messages.

Source: "When I type more than can fit on one line the text input box needs to grow to accomodate that text. That measn that the chat display moves up dynamically as well."
